headline: Norwegian Cruise Line, Offerpad, fuboTV, Somnigroup, and Ralph Lauren Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the morning session after investors priced in a potential de-escalation of the conflict in Iran alongside reassuring commentary from the Federal Reserve on interest rates.

headline: Oceania Cruises® Announces the Industry's First Floating Pastry Academy, in Partnership with The Butter Book®
summary: Oceania Cruises®, the world's leading culinary- and destination-focused luxury cruise line, today revealed The Floating Pastry Academy, a new multi-year training program for its onboard chefs, and first of its kind for the cruise industry, created in partnership with revered digital training platform, The Butter Book®.

headline: Disney Stock Is Trading Like a Cruise Line. Now Could Be the Time to Buy.
summary: Walt Disney  stock could bounce if the company focuses the next chapter of growth on its media business, Needham says.  Analyst Laura Martin wrote in a research note Tuesday that  Disney  stock is trading like a cruise ship company, not a media company.  Disney is currently trading at 13.7 times earnings over the next 12 months, which is a drop from its five-year average of 27.4 times.

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) After The Recent Share Price Slump
summary: If you are wondering whether Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings at around US$17.65 is a bargain or a value trap, this article walks you through what the market price might be implying about the stock. The share price has seen a 12.3% decline over the last 7 days, a 28.8% decline over the last 30 days and is down 22.5% year to date, while still sitting 32.2% above its level three years ago and 40.6% below where it was five years ago.
